title: Supply Chain Manager - Wabash National India - Experienced Professionals

jsonLd.title: Supply Chain Manager - Wabash National India - Experienced Professionals
jsonLd.description:
Wabash National India invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Supply Chain Manager at our Surat location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Wabash National India:
Wabash National India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Oversee end-to-end logistics operations for timely delivery
• Manage a fleet of vehicles and coordinate with drivers
• Optimize delivery routes to reduce cost and improve efficiency
• Track shipments in real-time and resolve delivery exceptions
• Ensure proper handling, packaging, and labeling of goods
• Implement cost-saving initiatives in transportation and warehousing
• Coordinate with warehousing teams for inbound and outbound operations

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in Vendor Management
• Proficiency in WMS
• Proficiency in Last Mile Delivery
• Proficiency in KPI Monitoring
• Proficiency in SAP SCM
• Proficiency in INCOTERMS
• Proficiency in Route Optimization

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Life and accident insurance
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Surat, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Wabash National India!
